notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly visible/ambiguous events (Fang Yuan teleporting, Kou Qiu fighting Northern Plains immortals, Fang Yuan pretending to be Xing Xiangzi). No clear hidden knowledge, future-known information, secret motives/plans, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present in the source pointers. The events described are either ordinary visible events or lack source-backed evidence for who knows/doesn't know a specific fact. No strong candidate for a hidden/future-known/player-visibility fact can be extracted from this chapter's seed data.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly factual events (方源传送、口蚯吞食、北原仙僵追杀) but no clear observed motive that can be directly tied to a character's internal drive. 方源's actions (escaping, testing rebirth method, impersonating 星象子) are visible but his underlying motive is ambiguous from this chapter alone - he is gathering rebirth methods but the 'why' (desire to overcome zombie body limitations, pursue immortality, etc.) is not directly stated in these paragraphs. 北原仙僵 chase 口蚯 but their motive (revenge? duty to 焚天魔女?) is not directly observed. No strong source-backed motive candidate can be extracted without psychological leaps.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
北原仙僵作为集体群体出现在种子中，与口蚯发生大战（ptr_4, ptr_5, ptr_6），口蚯钻土逃离。北原仙僵作为集体有追击口蚯的动机，但种子未明确说明后续行动，故为中等置信度模拟候选。
IF export filter quarantined 3 legacy old-schema branches.
Faction pressure subject filter quarantined 1 pressure candidates under policy reviewable.
